check_meaning: The Fano plane has n^2 + n + 1 points when n = 2.
Dual counting gives the same number of lines as points.
Every line is incident with n + 1 points.
Every point is incident with n + 1 lines.
There are 21 point pairs and each pair chooses exactly one line.
There are 21 line pairs and each pair meets in exactly one point.
